meta.title: Mill Bakery | Santa Ana Bakery and Breakfast Burritos
meta.description: Mill Bakery in Santa Ana serves Mexican pastries, pan dulce, breakfast burritos, coffee, and fresh morning favorites.

hero.eyebrow: Santa Ana bakery and breakfast stop
hero.title: Fresh pan dulce, breakfast burritos, and coffee every morning
hero.text: A neighborhood bakery on MacArthur serving Mexican pastries, conchas, burritos, coffee, and quick breakfast favorites for busy mornings.
hero.badgeText: Inspired by the bakery card: cream background, bakery red, and a golden border feel with a simple local look.

about.title: A local Santa Ana spot for pastries, coffee, and breakfast
paragraphs: Mill Bakery is a casual neighborhood bakery near MacArthur in Santa Ana, known for Mexican pastries, pan dulce, fresh coffee, and popular breakfast burritos.
It is the kind of place people stop into early, pick up something warm, and head back to work or home with a box of favorites.

favorites.title: Conchas
favorites.text: Soft, fluffy, and fresh for the morning pastry run or an afternoon treat.

favorites.title: Pan dulce
favorites.text: A colorful pastry case with classic Mexican bakery favorites and familiar daily staples.

favorites.title: Breakfast burritos
favorites.text: A go-to order for regulars looking for a filling breakfast that is quick, hot, and easy to grab.

favorites.title: Coffee
favorites.text: Hot coffee that pairs naturally with pan dulce and a quick stop before the day starts.

social.title: Follow along for fresh bakes and daily bakery updates
social.text: See what is coming out of the pastry case, keep up with breakfast favorites, and follow the bakery on Instagram.

footer.tagline: Mexican pastries, breakfast burritos, coffee, and pan dulce.

gallery.title: A quick look inside Mill Bakery
gallery.text: Fresh pastry trays, coffee, and the bakery counter all in one place.
